text.title: GitLab Duo Agent Platform Developer Flow Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Org deploys flows on GitLab 18.5. MR locks half-apply; duplicate merges land.
External system triggers flows via raw API token. Approval rules silently bypassed.
antipattern.fix: Restrict triggers to labels and scheduled pipelines; revoke bypass scope from agent tokens.

antipattern.symptom: Team uses Developer Flow for everything including CI failures. Pipeline fixes drag in irrelevant context.
antipattern.fix: Map task types to named flows explicitly; reject configs that route every label to one flow.
